# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

admin:
  access_log_path: /var/log/envoy/admin_access.log
  service_bind_address: '0.0.0.0'
  service_bind_port: 15001

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          '@type': type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.http_connection_manager.v2.HttpConnectionManager
          codec_type: AUTO
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: api_gateway
              domains:
              - '*'
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: /users
                route:
                  cluster: users_service
              - match:
                  prefix: /products
                route:
                  cluster: products_service

  clusters:
  - name: users_service
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: users-service:80
                port_value: 80
          local_endpoint:
            capture_response_headers: true
  - name: products_service
    connect_timeout: 1s
    type: STRICT_DNS
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: products-service:80
                port_value: 80
          local_endpoint:
            capture_response_headers: true

http:
  connection_manager:
    codec_type: AUTO
    stat_prefix: ingress_http
    route_config:
      name: local_route
      virtual_hosts:
        - name: api_gateway
          domains:
            - '*'
          routes:
          - match:
              prefix: /users
            route:
              cluster: users_service
          - match:
              prefix: /products
            route:
              cluster: products_service

    http_filters:
    - name: envoy.router
      typed_config: {}
  transport_sockets:
    tcp_keepalive:
      keepalive_time: 60s
      keepalive_interval: 10s
      keepalive_probes: 5

  router:
    http_connection_manager:
      idle_timeout: 15m
